brand_identity.name: Basic Shi
brand_identity.description: Premium streetwear and lifestyle essentials for the modern teenager. Minimalist, dark, and hype-driven.
brand_identity.persona: The Midnight Architect - Precision, stealth, and quiet confidence.
brand_identity.aesthetics: Apple Dark Mode x Neo-Brutalism. High contrast, vast negative space, and surgical typography.

grid.bento_main: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
grid.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-x-8 gap-y-12

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:scale-105 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-700 transition-colors

cards.product: group relative bg-transparent hover:bg-zinc-900/30 transition-colors rounded-2xl p-4 border border-transparent hover:border-zinc-800
cards.feature: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-zinc-800 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-all

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-zinc-800 focus:border-white text-white px-0 py-3 focus:outline-none placeholder:text-zinc-600 transition-colors

navigation.bar: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 flex items-center gap-8 z-50 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Force DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless explicitly asked. The brand is 'Midnight Only'.
2. IMAGES: Use large, immersive product imagery. The product is the hero.
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Use 'Space Grotesk' for all headings to establish the streetwear vibe. Use 'Inter' for body text for readability.
4. COMPONENTS: heavily customize Shadcn components. Remove default borders and backgrounds. Use the 'Glassmorphism' style for panels.
5. SPACING: Use generous padding (py-24, py-32) between sections. Do not clutter.
6. INTERACTIONS: Add smooth hover states to everything. Products should scale up slightly on hover.
7. NAVIGATION: Implement a floating, pill-shaped navigation bar instead of a standard top header.
